/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++ -stdlib=libc++ -fcolor-diagnostics -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX.sdk -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o ../lib/libcommon-utils.dylib -install_name @rpath/libcommon-utils.dylib "CMakeFiles/common-utils.dir/src/utils/logic_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/common-utils.dir/src/utils/relation_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/common-utils.dir/src/utils/template_params_utils.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/common-utils.dir/src/action_cancelled_exception.cpp.o"  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/nikitazotov/.conan2/p/b/sc-ma02cfe8ee8fbf6/p/lib /Users/nikitazotov/.conan2/p/b/sc-ma02cfe8ee8fbf6/p/lib/libsc-agents-common.dylib /Users/nikitazotov/.conan2/p/b/sc-ma02cfe8ee8fbf6/p/lib/libsc-memory.dylib /Users/nikitazotov/.conan2/p/b/sc-ma02cfe8ee8fbf6/p/lib/libsc-core.dylib
